description: Remove dead/unused code packages and functions. Three internal packages are defined but never imported by any code in the project: gateway, totp, and certrotation. Additionally, the logServerError method in api.go is defined but never called. Remove these to reduce maintenance burden and confusion.
steps: Delete the entire directory panel/internal/gateway/ (gateway.go). This ZarinPal payment gateway integration is never imported anywhere in the project.
Delete the entire directory panel/internal/totp/ (totp.go). This TOTP implementation is never imported anywhere in the project.
Delete the entire directory panel/internal/certrotation/ (worker.go). This certificate rotation worker is never imported or started from main.go.
Remove the logServerError method from panel/internal/api/api.go (around line 5606-5613). It is defined but never called anywhere in the codebase.
Run go build ./... to confirm no compile errors after removal.
Run go test ./... to confirm all tests still pass.
acceptance_criteria: Directories panel/internal/gateway/, panel/internal/totp/, panel/internal/certrotation/ no longer exist
The logServerError method is removed from api.go
go build ./... succeeds with no errors
verification: Run: ls panel/internal/gateway panel/internal/totp panel/internal/certrotation 2>&1 (should show 'No such file or directory' for all three)
findings: Clean removal. The log package import became unused after removing logServerError, so it was also removed. go build, go test, and go vet all pass cleanly.
